title: anthyllis vulneraria var. carpatica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. carpatica, also known as mountain kidney vetch, is a variety of the perennial herb Anthyllis vulneraria, native to mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. carpatica include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
